EXPLANATION: The paper "Sufficient statistics and minimum variance estimates" by C. R. Rao was published in the Mathematical Proceedings of the Cambridge Philosophical Society in 1949. The cited author "C Radhakrishna Rao" is the full name of "R. Rao", and the discrepancy noted by the checker is a minor naming convention variation.
